all.en: Welcome to module three of our global communication training series.
all.zh: 歡迎參加全球溝通訓練系列課程的第三模組。

all.en: Today, we will explore how cultural context shapes business interactions.
all.zh: 今日我們將探討文化脈絡如何形塑商業互動。

all.en: Our company now operates in more than thirty countries worldwide.
all.zh: 我們公司目前營運據點遍布全球 30 多國。

all.en: Misunderstandings often arise not from language but from cultural assumptions.
all.zh: 誤解往往並非來自語言，而是源自文化假設。

all.en: Researcher Erin Meyer identifies eight key dimensions of cultural difference.
all.zh: 研究者 Erin Meyer 提出八項關鍵的文化差異面向。

all.en: These dimensions include communication style, feedback, and decision making.
all.zh: 這些面向包括溝通風格、回饋方式與決策模式。

all.en: Some cultures prefer direct feedback delivered in front of peers.
all.zh: 有些文化偏好在同事面前直接給予回饋。

all.en: Others view such openness as embarrassing or even disrespectful.
all.zh: 其他文化則視這種坦率為尷尬甚至不尊重。

all.en: When in doubt, deliver constructive criticism in a private setting.
all.zh: 若有疑慮，請在私下場合提供建設性批評。

all.en: Time perception also varies significantly across regions and industries.
all.zh: 時間觀念也因地區與產業不同而有顯著差異。

all.en: Linear-time cultures expect punctuality and tight meeting agendas.
all.zh: 線性時間文化要求準時並嚴守會議議程。

all.en: Flexible-time cultures may treat schedules as guidelines rather than rules.
all.zh: 彈性時間文化可能將時程視為指引而非規定。

all.en: Neither approach is right or wrong, only different.
all.zh: 兩種做法並無對錯，只是有所不同。

all.en: Hierarchical cultures expect decisions to flow from senior leaders downward.
all.zh: 階層型文化期待決策由高層向下傳達。

all.en: Egalitarian cultures expect open debate and shared ownership of choices.
all.zh: 平權型文化期待公開辯論並共同承擔決策。

all.en: When working across these styles, always check who needs to be consulted.
all.zh: 跨風格合作時，務必確認需徵詢哪些人意見。

all.en: Avoid using slang, sports metaphors, or holiday references in global meetings.
all.zh: 全球會議中避免使用俚語、運動比喻或節慶典故。

all.en: These references may not translate well across audiences.
all.zh: 這些指涉在不同文化的聽眾間未必能順利轉譯。

all.en: Be patient when a colleague pauses before answering a question.
all.zh: 當同事在回答前停頓時，請保持耐心。

all.en: Silence in some cultures signals thoughtful consideration, not confusion.
all.zh: 在某些文化中，沉默代表深思熟慮而非困惑。

all.en: Confirm shared understanding by summarizing decisions in writing afterward.
all.zh: 事後以書面摘要決策內容，以確認彼此理解一致。

all.en: Build relationships through informal chats whenever travel allows.
all.zh: 差旅許可時，請藉非正式交談建立關係。

all.en: Trust developed face to face often unlocks faster collaboration online.
all.zh: 面對面建立的信任，往往能加速線上協作。

all.en: Please complete the reflection exercise before next week class.
all.zh: 請於下週上課前完成省思練習。
